title: Sharing Research Software: Reproducible, Citable, and Discoverable
description: A half-day Carpentries Incubator lesson on making research software findable, citable, and reusable. Learners start with a minimal GitHub repository and leave with a licensed, versioned release, a CITATION.cff file, a Zenodo DOI, and improved metadata for discovery.

creators.name: Langdon, Laura
